smoke.detail: pixi run pytest endpoints/lipophilicity/test_aggregate.py -q -> 11 passed. Tight cluster gives low spread flag + trust + consensus near measured logD~=1; scattered set gives high spread flag; logP lenses (RDKit Crippen WLOGP, SwissADME consensus) are converted via shared-pKa Henderson-Hasselbalch before entering the logD consensus and excluded (never averaged raw) when no pKa is available (F-12).

note: logD consensus aggregator: OPERA LogD native + RDKit Crippen/SwissADME logP converted via shared pKa (F-13 placeholder = OPERA pKa_b, F-16 di-cation model DEFERRED = monoprotic H-H). Spread + anchor-distance drive the low/high trust flag; anchored to measured logD~=1.
